mapper.sql: j.id, j.order_no, j.project_id, j.user_id, j.paotui_id, j.paotui_name, j.paotui_phone, j.target_address, j.fee, j.status, j.jiedan_time, j.update_time, p.title as project_title, u.name as user_name
mapper.select: select from jiedanxinxi j left join paotuixiangmu p on j.project_id = p.id left join user u on j.user_id = u.id where j.id = #{id}
select from jiedanxinxi j left join paotuixiangmu p on j.project_id = p.id left join user u on j.user_id = u.id where j.order_no = #{orderNo}
select from jiedanxinxi j left join paotuixiangmu p on j.project_id = p.id left join user u on j.user_id = u.id where j.project_id = #{projectId} and j.paotui_id = #{paotuiId}
mapper.insert: insert into jiedanxinxi (order_no, project_id, user_id, paotui_id, paotui_name, paotui_phone, target_address, fee, status, jiedan_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{projectId}, #{userId}, #{paotuiId}, #{paotuiName}, #{paotuiPhone}, #{targetAddress}, #{fee}, #{status}, now())

insert into jiedanxinxi
order_no, project_id, user_id, paotui_id, paotui_name, paotui_phone, target_address, fee, status, jiedan_time,
#{orderNo}, #{projectId}, #{userId}, #{paotuiId}, #{paotuiName}, #{paotuiPhone}, #{targetAddress}, #{fee}, #{status}, now(),
